hero.descripcion: Full-Stack Developer from Bucaramanga, Colombia. I have experience in ASP.NET, NestJS, Perl, and Angular. I am familiar with using Docker and AWS for application deployment. I am focused on solving technical problems logically and independently, always prioritizing the quality of the final result.

aboutme.introduccion: Full-Stack Developer focused on creating efficient, scalable, and high-quality systems. I combine my ongoing academic training with practical experience in software architecture, testing methodologies, and cloud solutions. I am known for my self-management skills, critical thinking to solve technical problems, and a consistent track record of delivering solid results. With a strong command of English that supports my excellent performance in the field, I invite you to explore my full profile in the following section.

roles.descripcion: Software developer with a broad stack, I stand out for my analytical skills, autonomy, and focus on solid technical results.
Technician with adaptive ability, knowledge in LAN networks, hardware, server knowledge and cloud hosting.
Freelance software developer with strong problem-solving skills. I have developed custom software and Android apps.

datos.descripcion: Training in networks, hardware and operating systems, basic programming.

datos.titulo: Technologist in Analysis and Development of Information Systems
datos.descripcion: Studies in front-end development, back-end and databases
English training with focus on technical communication

descripciones: Assistant systems technician. Administration of data networks, technical software support, hardware for computers and printers.
Use of office tools such as Excel and Word.
Preparation of monthly reports for National Health entities.
Backend development in Perl, PHP, Node.js and frontend in Angular.
Integration and development of ERP and POS systems.
Deployment and operation via Docker and intranet servers.
Leading the modernization and updating of internal software, managing the complete development lifecycle.
Integrating operational care modules with financial and high-precision electronic billing systems.
Developing scalable solutions with robust architectures based on ASP.NET and Angular.
Optimizing data persistence in hybrid environments using PostgreSQL and SQL Server.
Designing and implementing a custom quality management system, ensuring institutional traceability and compliance with technical standards.

lista.descripcion: Technical support ticket management system developed with Angular and Laravel. It allows users to report incidents, follow up in real time, and manage assignments across different teams within the organization. Includes a dashboard with metrics and automated notifications.

A mobile application for tracking emotional well-being and personal happiness. Developed in Kotlin for Android, it lets users log moods, set daily goals, and enjoy interactive mini-games to encourage habit-building.

Mobile application for parking management. It controls vehicle check-in and check-out, manages reservations via a connection to an ESP32 device over the local network, generates automatic billing, and shows real-time availability. Built with Kotlin and a PostgreSQL database hosted on Supabase.
